resibo.verdict: Walang mahanap na resibo si Perri... 👀

literacyLesson.summary: Sis, walang substance 'tong claim na 'to! Parang nag-assume lang si Marites without kahit anong basis.

points.issue: Walang specific na info or details, puro general statement lang, teh!
points.correction: Dapat may konkretong example or explanation para mas credible.
Importante na may pinanggalingan yung info, like news article or expert opinion.

points.issue: Parang opinion lang talaga, walang factual basis.
points.correction: Dapat supported ng facts, research, or data para mas convincing.

literacyLesson.tip: Next time, hanap ka ng claim na may proof at galing sa mapagkakatiwalaang source para sure na hindi chismis lang!
